title: DIY Giant Jenga With Mobile Storage Case
summary: Learn how to make a fun Giant Yard Jenga set with a mobile carrying case with locking casters that doubles as a platform to play your game!
description: Learn how to make a fun Giant Yard Jenga set with a mobile carrying case with locking casters that doubles as a platform to play your game!

steps.title: Cut Your Jenga Pieces
steps.body: Create your giant Jenga pieces by cutting your six 2x4's into 54 pieces. Each piece will be 10 1/2" long.

steps.title: Assemble Top & Bottom Panels
steps.body: Assemble your 21 1/2" long top and bottom panels with 1 1/4" pocket hole screws and wood glue.

steps.title: Assemble Short Side Panels
steps.body: Assemble two 14 3/4" short side panels for your box with 1 1/4" pocket hole screws and wood glue.

steps.title: Assemble Long Side Panels
steps.body: Assemble the two 20" long side panels of the box with 1 1/4" wood screws and glue. You will also need to drill pocket holes on both ends of the panels to attach them to the small side panels.

steps.title: Assemble Box Frame
steps.body: Assemble your box frame by attaching the long side panels to the inside face of the short panels with 1 1/4" pocket hole screws & glue.

steps.title: Add Bottom Panel
steps.body: Add the bottom panel to the box frame with wood glue and 1 1/4" wood screws.

steps.title: Attach Top Panel
steps.body: Attach top panel with two hinges and lock/latch.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand and stain box. Add handles and locking casters for easier transportation!
